ddls:
CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the category */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the budget belongs to */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the budget */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year the budget applies to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the budget was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the budget */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the budget */,
  "approved_on" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the budget was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenditures" (
  "expenditure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget the expenditure belongs to */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the expenditure */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the expenditure was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expenditure */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the expenditure was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the expenditure */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the expenditure */,
  "approved_on" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the expenditure was approved */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the invoice related to the expenditure */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., check, electronic transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expenditure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditures_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditures_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_aid_grants" (
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student receiving the grant */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the grant */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the grant was awarded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the grant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the grant */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the grant */,
  "approved_on" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the grant was approved */,
  "grant_type" TEXT /* Type of grant (e.g., emergency, scholarship) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_aid_grants_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_aid_grants_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tuition_reimbursements" (
  "reimbursement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reimbursement */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student receiving the reimbursement */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the reimbursement */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the reimbursement was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reimbursement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the reimbursement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the reimbursement */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the reimbursement */,
  "approved_on" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the reimbursement was approved */,
  "reimbursement_type" TEXT /* Type of reimbursement (e.g., tuition, housing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reimbursement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tuition_reimbursements_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tuition_reimbursements_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tuition_discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student receiving the discount */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the discount */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the discount was awarded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the discount */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the discount was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the discount */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the discount */,
  "approved_on" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the discount was approved */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of discount (e.g., academic, financial need) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tuition_discounts_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tuition_discounts_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technology_costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student incurring the cost */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the cost */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the cost was incurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cost */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the cost was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the cost */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the cost */,
  "approved_on" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the cost was approved */,
  "cost_type" TEXT /* Type of technology cost (e.g., hardware, software) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technology_costs_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technology_costs_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "internet_costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user incurring the cost */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the cost */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the cost was incurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cost */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the cost was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the cost */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the cost */,
  "approved_on" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the cost was approved */,
  "cost_type" TEXT /* Type of internet cost (e.g., broadband, mobile data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_internet_costs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_internet_costs_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the student record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the student record */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected graduation date */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the student (e.g., enrolled, graduated, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the faculty member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the faculty member */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the faculty record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the faculty record */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the faculty member was hired */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the faculty member (e.g., active, on leave) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g. administrator, financial manager) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user record */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the report belongs to */,
  "amount_allocated" TEXT /* Amount of funds allocated to the category */,
  "amount_spent" TEXT /* Amount of funds spent in the category */,
  "balance" TEXT /* Remaining balance in the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, annual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)
